info.english_meaning: to ill-speak to abuse to tell lies to keep quiet
info.hindI_arTa: durBAzaRa denA durvacana kahanA gAlI bakanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH   ' SaWayet SvaWayedete dve samyagavaBAzaRe ' (Slo. 81) iti devaH  ' samyagABAzaRe samyagvacanakriyAyAmiti kzIrasvAmI ' iti puruzakAraH  kzIrataraNgiRyAM tu ' asamyagABAzaRe ' ityeva dfSyate  ' samyagABAzaRe ' iti durgaH  ' samyagBAzaRe ' iti SAkawAyanaH
